ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "delta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delta where the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location within the delta */,
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the surface type (e.g., Land, Water) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "ndvi" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) */,
  "red" REAL /* Red band reflectance */,
  "evi" REAL /* Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) */,
  "savi" REAL /* Soil-Adjusted Vegetation Index (SAVI) */,
  "gr" REAL /* Green band reflectance (GR) */,
  "ndssi" REAL /* Normalized Difference Soil Salinity Index (NDSI) */,
  "nsmi" REAL /* Normalized Soil Moisture Index (NSMI) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_surface_id FOREIGN KEY ("surface_id") REFERENCES surfaces ("surface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_delta_id FOREIGN KEY ("delta_id") REFERENCES deltas ("delta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deltas" (
  "delta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delta */,
  "delta_name" TEXT /* Name of the delta */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delta */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the delta */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the delta */,
  "delta_type" TEXT /* Type of delta (e.g., river delta, coastal delta) */,
  "delta_area" REAL /* Area of the delta in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "delta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delta where the location is situated */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surfaces" (
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface type */,
  "surface_name" TEXT /* Name of the surface type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surface type */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., land, water, ice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., remote sensing, in-situ measurement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the data point */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who assessed the data point */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution where the reviewer is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_licenses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was published */,
  "citation_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_citations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing step */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "processing_step" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing step was applied */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used to apply the processing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data point */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was conducted */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the data (e.g., visual inspection, automated checks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)
